fields.helpText: This prescription reference consists of two semi-colon pieces.  The first  piece is the ien from file 52.  The second piece is the fill/refill  number, with 0 being the initial fill.

This is the Patient Rx/Eligibility determination indicator.  This is the flag returned back to ECME/Pharmacy to indicate what eligibility was determined for this prescription.  This may effect if a medication can be dispensed to the patient if they are not returned as a V (veteran).
This is the Rate Type that was determined at the time of the billable check to be used on the bill when the bill is created.
This is the copayment charge that was created in association with this billing event. This is used to reverse previously billed copayment charges.
